title: TWO CLIMATE PROMISES IN ONE PEN STROKE — BOTH KEPT
title_alt: UN GREEN CLIMATE FUND HALTED + PARIS EXIT — BOTH KEPT
ROSE GARDEN JUNE 1, 2017 — THE CLIMATE RECEIPT VOTERS FORGET
KEPT: UN Climate + Paris Agreement | SEALED
description:
Two climate-skeptic promises from the 2016 trail, both literally delivered.

March 28, 2017 — Presidential Memorandum halted U.S. payments to the UN Green Climate Fund. June 1, 2017 — Rose Garden announcement, Paris Agreement withdrawal. November 4, 2019 — formal UN withdrawal notice filed (first day legally permissible). November 4, 2020 — withdrawal effective.

Climate voters assumed BROKEN. The book grades it KEPT.

Full 145-promise audit: https://sealed2016.com?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=shorts&utm_campaign=un-climate-paris
